detail: Q: obama | A: Ah, a classic. Quite a weighty presence, isn't he?  Let’s just say he was a man with a complicated vision.
Q: hanuman | A: Right, a deity, naturally.  Let’s just say he’s a *very* large fan of mango smoothies.
To: Amma | Msg: i will be late
Q: elon musk | A: Right, let’s just say you’ve got a *lot* on your plate, haven't you?
Q: i need to do | A: Please elaborate. What do you need to do?
Q: pasta | A: Please tell me what you need to make or prepare.

Q: brainstorming about the origin of the pasta how they structured what | A: Pasta originated in Italy, likely around 8th century AD, as a simple flatbread made from durum wheat flour.  Ancient Romans used a similar dish, but pasta evolved into the layered, doughy form we know today.
